startPoint.en: Talk to Awusah the Mayor in Nardah.
startPoint.es: Habla con Awusah the Mayor en Nardah.

items.name: Law rune
items.display: 1 law rune and 1 air rune to cast the Telekinetic Grab spell

items.name: Light source
items.display: A light source (such as a torch, mining helmet, bullseye lantern or Seer's headband)

items.name: Thread
items.display: One or two spools of thread

items.name: Attack types
items.display: A weapon for each melee attack style - stab (sword), crush (mace) and slash (scimitar) (other styles work but are extremely inefficient)

children.name: For higher melee levelled players, all may not be needed
children.display: For higher melee levelled players, all may not be needed

items.name: A method of attacking with at least 4 range
items.display: A method of attacking with at least 4 range

children.name: Bow
children.display: A Bow or crossbow with ammo unless using chargebow (a shortbow and bronze arrows can be found during the quest)

recommended.name: Coins
recommended.display: Enough coins and a ring of charos for 4 magic carpet rides (300 to 4,000)

recommended.name: Traveller's necklace
recommended.display: A traveller's necklace, enchanted broomstick, dominion medallion, ring of slaying, or the Al Kharid lodestone to quickly travel to the source of the River Elid

recommended.name: Waterskin
recommended.display: At least 2 drinks from a waterskin—no more are needed if the magic carpets are used

recommended.name: Prayer potion
recommended.display: Low and medium-level players may bring prayer potions, rings of recoil and/or food to defeat the golems

rewards.name: Nardah
rewards.display: Access to Nardah's fountain and shrine (praying at the statue will fill your life points, temporarily boost it, and restore your prayer points)

text.en: Head to Nardah (south of fairy ring DLQ) and talk to Awusah the Mayor in the building east of the fountain.
text.es: Dirígete a Nardah (al sur del fairy ring DLQ) y habla con Awusah the Mayor en el edificio al este de la fuente.

chatOptions: 1 I am an adventurer in search of quests.
2 Any idea how you got this curse?

text.en: Head to the house north-east of the fountain and talk to Ghaslor the Elder. You should receive a Ballad.
text.es: Dirígete a la casa al noreste de la fuente y habla con Ghaslor the Elder. Deberías recibir una Ballad.

chatOptions: 1 I am trying to find out the cause of this town's curse.

text.en: Head to the building that has a statuette plinth just west of Ghaslor's house and north of the fountain.
text.es: Dirígete al edificio que tiene un pedestal para estatuillas justo al oeste de la casa de Ghaslor y al norte de la fuente.

text.en: Telegrab the ancestral key from the table.
text.es: Usa telequinesis para coger la ancestral key de la mesa.

text.en: You may attach the ancestral key to your steel key ring if you've completed the One Small Favour quest
text.es: Puedes añadir la ancestral key a tu steel key ring si has completado la misión One Small Favour.

text.en: Go to the other side of the building and open the northernmost cupboard and search it for the robe top and bottom.
text.es: Ve al otro lado del edificio, abre el armario situado más al norte y busca en él la parte superior e inferior de la túnica.

text.en: Fix the top and bottom robes.
text.es: Repara las partes superior e inferior de la túnica.

text.en: Head north, past the Dominion Tower until a waterfall is seen.
text.es: Dirígete al norte, pasando el Dominion Tower, hasta que veas una cascada.

text.en: You can teleport to there by using a traveller's necklace to south of the Uzer eagles' eyrie.
text.es: Puedes teletransportarte hasta allí usando un traveller's necklace al sur del Uzer eagles' eyrie.

text.en: There is a bronze arrow south-east of Dominion Tower and a shortbow north-east of it.
text.es: Hay una bronze arrow al sureste del Dominion Tower y un shortbow al noreste de este.

text.en: Climb the waterfall.
text.es: Sube por la cascada.

text.en: Equip the Robes of Elidinis and open the door.
text.es: Equípate las Robes of Elidinis y abre la puerta.

text.en: If the door will not open, make sure you repaired and are wearing both robe pieces, and make sure you have the Ancestral key you tele-grabbed earlier.
text.es: Si la puerta no se abre, asegúrate de haber reparado y de llevar puestas ambas partes de la túnica, y asegúrate de tener la Ancestral key que cogiste con telequinesis anteriormente.

text.en: Head east to the three doors.
text.es: Dirígete al este, hacia las tres puertas.

text.en: Try to open any door, kill the golem that spawns, then enter the room and clear the water channel for each room.
text.es: Intenta abrir cualquier puerta, mata al golem que aparece, luego entra en la sala y despeja el canal de agua de cada sala.

text.en: If you click the door before the golem's death animation has finished, it will respawn and you will have to fight it again.
text.es: Si haces clic en la puerta antes de que termine la animación de muerte del golem, este reaparecerá y tendrás que luchar contra él de nuevo.

rows: Shoot target with a bow and arrow, magic, or necromancy

text.en: Head through the door to the north and talk to one of the spirits in the large area.
text.es: Dirígete a través de la puerta hacia el norte y habla con uno de los espíritus en la zona grande.

chatOptions: 4 I come as an emissary from the people of Nardah.
1 Is there anything they can do to get their fountain working again?

text.en: Head back to Nardah.
text.es: Regresa a Nardah.

text.en: It is possible to be bugged when exiting the cave. To get out of the bug, simply use a Home Teleport spell.
text.es: Es posible que ocurra un bug al salir de la cueva. Para solucionarlo, simplemente usa un hechizo de Home Teleport.

text.en: Amulet of glory teleport to Al Kharid and then taking the magic carpet to Nardah is a quick option.
text.es: Teletransportarte con el amulet of glory hasta Al Kharid y luego coger la magic carpet hasta Nardah es una opción rápida.

text.en: Talk to Awusah the Mayor.
text.es: Habla con Awusah the Mayor.

text.en: Take shoes just south from the entrance door inside the Mayor's house.
text.es: Coge los zapatos justo al sur de la puerta de entrada dentro de la casa del Mayor.

text.en: Go outside the house, then remove-sole from the shoes to obtain a sole.
text.es: Sal de la casa y luego usa remove-sole en los zapatos para obtener una suela.

text.en: Ensure you have a light source or you will not be able to talk to the next NPC without being interrupted.
text.es: Asegúrate de tener una fuente de luz o no podrás hablar con el siguiente NPC sin ser interrumpido.

text.en: Head west from the Nardah General Store, past a camp of trainee adventurers and climb-down the crevice.
text.es: Dirígete al oeste desde el Nardah General Store, pasando un campamento de aventureros novatos, y baja por la grieta (climb-down).

text.en: Talk to the Genie , then talk again.
text.es: Habla con el Genie, luego habla con él de nuevo.

chatOptions: 1 I'm after a statue that was thrown down here.
1 Maybe I can make a deal for it?
3 Ok I agree to the deal.

text.en: If your backpack was full, pick up the Statuette. - There will be room now as you gave the Genie a sole.
text.es: Si tu mochila estaba llena, recoge la Statuette. - Ahora habrá espacio, ya que le diste la suela al Genie.

text.en: Head back to Nardah and use the statuette on the plinth in the shrine room, north of the fountain.
text.es: Regresa a Nardah y usa la statuette en el pedestal de la sala del santuario, al norte de la fuente.

text.en: Optional: Pray at the statue for medium desert task achievement Heathen Idle.
text.es: Opcional: Reza ante la estatua para conseguir el logro de tarea del desierto de dificultad media Heathen Idle.

text.en: Quest complete!
text.es: ¡Misión completada!
